steps.title: Trace the studies
steps.content: The text introduces convergent evolution, then describes one study of convergence through shared genetic mechanisms and another study of convergence through different genetic mechanisms. It then says the remaining uncertainty motivated a third study.

steps.title: Avoid added judgments
steps.content: A invents an assumption and says it is unfounded. B reverses the order by treating the third study as the first focus and adds a critique. C overstates the passage by describing the development of a whole field and future speculation. The structure is simpler. The answer is D.
